function.name: get_uv_index
function.description: Get current and daily UV index for a city.
function.long_description: Retrieves UV index details, including current UV index and daily peak UV values, for a specified city using an external weather API.

city.description: Name of the city to get UV index details for

example_user_queries: What is the UV index in Bengaluru right now?
Show the current UV index for Los Angeles.
Get the UV level for Dubai.
Tell me today’s UV index in Sydney.
Fetch the UV index for Tokyo.
How strong is the UV index in Miami?
Check the UV index in Singapore.
Show UV conditions for Cape Town.
Get the current UV index using city London.
What is the UV exposure level in New Delhi?
